ingredients: 2 (10 ounce) cans natural chunk chicken, drained
¾ cup hot pepper sauce (such as Frank's RedHot)
2 (8 ounce) packages reduced-fat cream cheese, softened
1 cup shredded reduced-fat Cheddar cheese, divided
1 bunch celery, cleaned and cut into 4-inch pieces
directions: Gather all ingredients.
Heat chicken and hot sauce in a skillet over medium heat until heated through, about 5 minutes. Stir in cream cheese and ranch dressing; cook and stir until well blended and warm, 5 to 7 minutes.
Mix in 1/2 of the Cheddar.
Transfer mixture to a slow cooker. Sprinkle remaining Cheddar over top. Cover and cook on Low until hot and bubbly, about 30 minutes.
Serve with celery sticks and crackers.

ingredients: 1 (8 ounce) package seasoned chicken-style vegetarian strips (such as Morningstar Farms® Chik'n Strips), diced
2 (8 ounce) packages reduced fat cream cheese, softened
1 (16 ounce) bottle reduced-fat ranch salad dressing
1 (12 fluid ounce) bottle hot buffalo wing sauce (such as Frank's® REDHOT Buffalo Wing Sauce)
directions: Place the diced vegetarian chicken strips, cream cheese, ranch dressing, and buffalo wing sauce into a slow cooker. Cook on Low, stirring occasionally, until the cheese has melted and the dip is hot, 1 to 2 hours. Stir in the shredded cheese and serve.

recipe_title: Buffalo Chicken Dip with Sour Cream
ingredients: 2 (5 ounce) skinless, boneless chicken breast halves
1 ½ cups shredded Cheddar cheese, divided
directions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add chicken; cover and reduce heat to medium. Simmer until chicken is no longer pink in the center and juices run clear, about 10 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 165 degrees F (74 degrees C). Remove chicken and shred when cool enough to handle.
Combine ranch dressing and sour cream in a saucepan over low heat. Stir and heat until warm, about 5 minutes. Stir in hot sauce and 1/2 cup Cheddar cheese, followed by shredded chicken.
Transfer mixture to an 8-inch round baking dish and top with remaining 1 cup Cheddar cheese. Place in the refrigerator to cool for 1 to 2 hours.
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
Remove dip from the refrigerator and bake in the preheated oven until cheese is bubbly, 20 to 30 minutes. Let cool slightly before serving.

ingredients: 1 (15 ounce) jar chunky-style blue cheese salad dressing (such as Marzetti®)
1 (12 ounce) bottle Buffalo wing sauce (such as Frank's RedHot®)
directions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
Stir together blue cheese salad dressing and cream cheese in a mixing bowl until smooth. Stir in chicken, Buffalo wing sauce, and blue cheese crumbles; pour chicken mixture into a baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven until bubbling, 15 to 20 minutes.

ingredients: ½ cup ranch salad dressing, or to taste
½ cup Buffalo wing sauce (such as Sweet Baby Ray's®)
½ cup shredded mozzarella cheese, or to taste
2 (12.5 fl oz) cans chicken chunks, drained
directions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
Beat cream cheese in a deep baking dish until smooth. Add ranch dressing, Buffalo wing sauce, and mozzarella cheese to cream cheese and stir until smooth. Stir in chicken.
Bake in the preheated oven until heated through and bubbling, about 20 minutes.

recipe_title: Buffalo Ranch Chicken and Cheese Dip
ingredients: 1 ½ cups shredded Colby-Monterey Jack cheese
directions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
Mix chicken, cream cheese, buffalo wing sauce, ranch dressing, and sour cream together in a large bowl; transfer to a 9x13-inch baking dish. Sprinkle Colby-Monterey Jack cheese evenly on top.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese is melted and lightly browned, 25 to 30 minutes. Serve with tortilla chips.

ingredients: ½ cup Buffalo wing sauce (such as Frank's® Red Hot)
½ cup shredded sharp Cheddar cheese
directions: Season chicken breasts with salt, pepper, and garlic powder. Place in the slow cooker and cover with the lid.

Cook on Low until chicken is cooked through, about 3 hours. Drain accumulated juices. Shred chicken using a hand mixer. Add cream cheese, sour cream, Buffalo wing sauce, and Cheddar cheese. Cook on Low for 1 more hour. Stir to combine.
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add chicken breasts; cook until juices run clear, about 4 minutes per side. Transfer to a cutting board; cool completely. Shred into strands using a fork.
Combine cream cheese, hot pepper sauce, and ranch dressing in a bowl until well blended. Add shredded chicken; mix well. Transfer mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish; sprinkle Cheddar cheese over top.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese is bubbling, about 10 minutes.

recipe_title: Quick and Easy Baked Buffalo Chicken Dip
ingredients: ¾ cup hot sauce (such as Frank's RedHot ®)
½ cup shredded pepper Jack cheese
4 fully cooked chicken breasts, cut into bite-size pieces
⅓ cup shredded pepper Jack cheese
directions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C). Grease a baking dish.

Beat cream cheese, hot sauce, 1/2 cup pepper Jack cheese, and blue cheese dressing together in a large bowl; fold in chicken until completely coated. Pour mixture into the prepared baking dish and top with crumbled blue cheese and 1/3 cup pepper Jack cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese is melted and dip is bubbling up the sides, 15 to 20 minutes.

ingredients: 1 ½ cups shredded skinless rotisserie chicken breast
½ (8 ounce) package cream cheese, cut into chunks
⅓ cup Buffalo-style hot pepper sauce (such as Frank's® Red Hot®)
2 tablespoons crumbled blue cheese, or to taste
directions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Grease a 3-cup oven-proof serving dish with cooking spray.

Combine shredded chicken, cream cheese, and cayenne in a 10-inch nonstick skillet over medium heat. Stir until cream cheese has melted, 2 to 3 minutes. Stir in ranch dressing, remove from heat, and pour into the prepared dish. Spread Buffalo sauce evenly over top and sprinkle with Cheddar.
Bake in the preheated oven until dip is warmed through and cheese is melted, about 20 minutes. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with blue cheese. Serve warm.

ingredients: 1 (15 ounce) can quartered artichoke hearts, diced
⅓ cup hot sauce (such as Frank's RedHot ®), or more to taste
2 (10 ounce) cans white meat chicken, drained and flaked
directions: Mix cream cheese, artichoke hearts, Cheddar cheese, ranch dressing, sour cream, hot sauce, and bacon bits together in a saucepan over medium heat; cook, stirring frequently, until cheeses are melted, 5 to 10 minutes. Add chicken to cream cheese mixture and cook until heated through, about 5 more minutes.

ingredients: 1 (12 fluid ounce) can or bottle hot chicken wing sauce
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).

Place chicken in a pot with enough water to cover. Bring to a boil and cook 25 minutes, until chicken juices run clear. Drain liquid from pot and shred chicken. Mix wing sauce and butter into pot. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to low and simmer 10 minutes.
Spread cream cheese over the bottom of an 8x8 inch baking dish. Pour chicken mixture over cream cheese. Top with dressing.
Bake 15 minutes in the preheated oven, until hot and bubbly.

ingredients: ¾ pound fully cooked breaded chicken breast tenderloins
½ cup Buffalo sauce, or to taste
4 slices bacon strips, cooked and crumbled
directions: Dice cooked chicken tenders. Transfer to a large bowl and add mayonnaise, sour cream, Buffalo sauce, blue cheese, bacon, green onions, and jalapeno. Stir to combine.
Allow to come together/thicken in the refrigerator for 1 hour before serving.

recipe_title: Buffalo Chicken Dip in the Slow Cooker
ingredients: ½ cup blue cheese salad dressing
directions: Combine chicken, cream cheese, Colby-Jack cheese, goat cheese, Buffalo wing sauce, blue cheese dressing, bell pepper, onion, and celery in a slow cooker.
Cook on Low for 4 hours. Transfer dip to a bowl and sprinkle with chopped scallions.

ingredients: 1 tablespoon Trappey's Red Devil™ Cayenne Pepper Sauce
1 (4.25 ounce) can Underwood® White Meat Chicken Spread
directions: Combine all ingredients until well blended.
Serve with assorted vegetables or crackers.
If preferred served hot, bake in oven at 350 degrees F until bubbling.

ingredients: 1 (8 ounce) package fat-free cream cheese, softened
½ cup fat-free blue cheese salad dressing
½ cup Buffalo wing sauce (such as Frank's RedHot®)
1 (8 ounce) package shredded smoked Cheddar cheese
directions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Saute chicken in the hot oil with garlic powder until no longer pink in the center and juices run clear, 5 to 8 minutes.
Spread cream cheese onto the bottom of an oven-proof round pie dish. Add cooked chicken and blue cheese crumbles.
Mix blue cheese salad dressing and Buffalo sauce together in a bowl; pour evenly over cream cheese and chicken. Top with smoked Cheddar cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven until heated through and cheese is melted, about 25 minutes. Remove from the oven and let rest for 2 to 3 minutes; stir to mix ingredients.

ingredients: 2 (8 ounce) packages cream cheese, at room temperature
1 tablespoon Buffalo wing sauce (such as Frank's RedHot®), or to taste
¼ teaspoon minced garlic, or to taste
½ (1 ounce) package dry ranch dressing mix
directions: Stir cream cheese until smooth. Mix in chicken until well incorporated. Add Buffalo sauce, mayonnaise, garlic, and ranch dressing mix; mix well.
Scoop onto plastic wrap. Wrap and roll into a tight ball. Refrigerate for 8 hours, or overnight.
